free_text: Properties of 36Ar and 38Ar nuclear levels excited in
the capture of protons by chlorine isotopes.
Two semiconductor counters were used. Fixed
counter placed at an angle of 90 degr. to the
proton beam detected alpha particles from both
reactions, and a counter placed at an angle of 150
degr. detected protons elastically scattered on carbon
Pairs of four-chloride carbon with a natural mixture
of chlorine isotopes were used as targets.
